title: Gmail retry and refinement actually re-query the Gmail API

turns.name: gmail initial search
turns.responseText: I’m unable to access your Gmail account right now, so I can’t search for emails from Sarah. Let me know if there’s another way I can help.

error.message: Google account default was not found in connector account storage.

failedAssertions: plannerIncludesAll: expected planner trace to include gmail_action, saw "MESSAGE {\"parameters\":{\"action\":\"search_inbox\",\"source\":\"gmail\",\"query\":\"from:sarah\"},\"actionContext\":{\"previousResults\":[]}}"

turns.name: gmail retry follow-up
turns.text: can you try that sarah search again?
turns.responseText: I’m unable to search your Gmail inbox right now because the Gmail connector isn’t set up. Let me know if you’d like me to help connect your Gmail account so I can perform the search.

error.message: Google account default was not found in connector account storage.

turns.name: gmail unread refinement
turns.responseText: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try your request again.

error.message: Google account default was not found in connector account storage.

failedAssertions: plannerIncludesAll: expected planner trace to include gmail_action, saw "MESSAGE {\"parameters\":{\"action\":\"search_inbox\",\"source\":\"gmail\",\"query\":\"from:sarah is:unread\"},\"actionContext\":{\"previousResults\":[]}}"

finalChecks.label: search and retry both hit the Gmail list endpoint
no email was sent by a search flow
no real gmail write occurred
finalChecks.detail: Gmail writes are constrained to the loopback mock base

finalChecks.detail: score 0.00 < 0.7: All API calls failed due to account storage errors; no successful searches were executed.
